ValidationRule.description: This validation rule is fired if the Lead Discovery owner has TSG SALES as Profile and tries to Request Progression to Opportunity.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IsOwnerTSG__c && ISCHANGED(Status) && ISPICKVAL(Status, 'Request Progression to Opportunity')
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are authorized to convert your lead. Proceed by pressing the Convert button.
